title: What is the evangelion true nature or origin in rebuild
display_title: What is the evangelion true nature or origin in rebuild
wikitext: []: What is the evangelion true nature or origin in rebuild?             Quote Post by The18°angel » Wed Oct 06, 2021 12:29 pm we know that in the original anime and manga the evas are clones of adam and lillith and the only evangelion to acquire the status of "god" is unit 01 because it was cloned from lillith who is the seed that has the fruit of knowledge and later unit 01 acquires organ S2 which is the fruit of life becoming the closest thing we see to a god or a version of the FAR but in rebuild things are different since we have several entities that fall in the classification of being an "evangelion" in that we have the evas, the offer types and the adams, survivors of adam and recipients of adam and one of the most important things strange the failures of the infinite or the "wanderers" as were called in the village 03 that seem to be humans who mutated in that way during the third impact. in rebuild 2.0 ritsuko said that unit 01 returned to its original form during N3I which was a radiant energy being close to divinity. Unit 02 is transformed into a being of energy when Asuka injects it with the blood of the ninth angel and the Eva of Mari, after devouring the offer types, acquires a halo of energy and apparently becomes a god. so the evas on this occasion are similar to what we see in the anime and manga or on the contrary they are the attempts to seele and nerv to recreate the "gods" who left the adams, lillith and the spears.

chunks.content:
Article: What is the evangelion true nature or origin in rebuild
[]: What is the evangelion true nature or origin in rebuild?             Quote Post by The18°angel » Wed Oct 06, 2021 12:29 pm we know that in the original anime and manga the evas are clones of adam and lillith and the only evangelion to acquire the status of "god" is unit 01 because it was cloned from lillith who is the seed that has the fruit of knowledge and later unit 01 acquires organ S2 which is the fruit of life becoming the closest thing we see to a god or a version of the FAR but in rebuild things are different since we have several entities that fall in the classification of being an "evangelion" in that we have the evas, the offer types and the adams, survivors of adam and recipients of adam and one of the most important things strange the failures of the infinite or the "wanderers" as were called in the village 03 that seem to be humans who mutated in that way during the third impact. in rebuild 2.0 ritsuko said that unit 01 returned to its original form during N3I which was a radiant energy being close to divinity. Unit 02 is transformed into a being of energy when Asuka injects it with the blood of the ninth angel and the Eva of Mari, after devouring the offer types, acquires a halo of energy and apparently becomes a god. so the evas on this occasion are similar to what we see in the anime and manga or on the contrary they are the attempts to seele and nerv to recreate the "gods" who left the adams, lillith and the spears.
